metadata.siteDescription: MediBoo helps parents keep children's care routines calm, organized, and easy to follow.

landing.title: One place to keep your child's care routine calm and clear.
landing.description: MediBoo helps parents organize symptoms, medications, and daily follow-ups so care decisions feel simpler, faster, and less stressful.

features.title: Designed to feel organized, not clinical.
features.description: MediBoo keeps the interface soft, readable, and intentionally simple so families can focus on the child, not the tool.

cards.title: One calm care timeline
cards.body: Track symptoms, medications, and follow-ups in one place so the next step is always clear.

cards.title: Built for busy parents
cards.body: Fast daily check-ins and reminders keep routines steady without adding more friction.

cards.title: Easy to share
cards.body: Bring structured notes to appointments and keep caregivers aligned on what changed.

howItWorks.title: A steady routine in three quick steps.
howItWorks.description: Keep updates light during the day, then bring the full picture into every follow-up.
items: Log symptoms, medications, and care notes in seconds.
Keep recurring routines visible with gentle reminders.
Walk into appointments with a simple history that makes sense.

faq.title: Questions parents ask before they install.
faq.description: The iOS app is available now, and the Android launch is being staged through the waitlist.

items.question: Is MediBoo already available on iPhone?
items.answer: Yes. The current launch is focused on the iOS experience, with Android access opening through the waitlist.

items.question: Does the Google Play button download anything today?
items.answer: No. It opens the Android waitlist modal so interested parents can get notified first.

items.question: Can I request full data removal?
items.answer: Yes. Use the dedicated delete-data page linked in the footer to send a verified removal request.

cta.title: Start organizing your family's health today.
cta.description: Simple, calm, and designed for real parents.

testimonials.title: What families say after using MediBoo.
testimonials.description: Real feedback from parents and caregivers keeping routines, notes, and visits in one place.

items.name: Marta K.
items.quote: I finally have symptoms, medications, and appointments in one place. With three kids, that saves my head because nothing disappears into notes and messages.

items.name: Bartek C.
items.quote: I shared the profile with my wife and we instantly have one clear record. We do not duplicate information and it is easier to stay on top of medications and appointments.

items.name: Kasia W.
items.quote: My favorite part is the order and simplicity. I can quickly save what happened and later see everything clearly, without chaos.

items.name: Michal P.
items.quote: Beyond the kids, I also keep my parents' health here: results, medications, visits. I finally do not have to remember everything in my head.

items.name: Ewa S.
items.role: Mom of 2 plus grandparents in one profile
items.quote: I added the children and grandparents in one place. It is easy to go back through the history and faster to tell the doctor what happened earlier.

waitlist.title: Join the early access list
waitlist.successBody: We will let you know when the Android version is ready.
waitlist.successMeta: Your email has been added to the MediBoo waitlist.
waitlist.consent: I agree to receive launch updates about the Android release.
waitlist.error: We could not save your request. Please try again in a moment.

footer.description: Calm tools for managing pediatric routines, daily symptoms, and practical follow-ups with less mental overhead.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These terms describe the basic rules for using the MediBoo website and mobile application.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what information MediBoo processes and how it is used to support the service.

deleteData.title: Request permanent data deletion
deleteData.description: Use this form to request removal of your MediBoo account data. We may contact you to verify ownership before deletion is completed.
deleteData.note: Include the email used in the app and enough context for us to identify the account.
deleteData.successBody: We will review your request and follow up using the email you provided.
deleteData.messagePlaceholder: Please delete all account data connected to this email address.
deleteData.error: We could not send the form. Please try again.
